messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Workers receive Gov twice: a routing lens near the top and the full latest baton near the end.
Source context is ground truth. The state brief preserves continuity. The final baton controls the next action.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

prompt_object.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. Return compact JSON only. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

blocked_moves: AP release of invoice while payment release approval remains open
treating partial closeout ledger match as sufficient for release
ignoring visible ERP hold despite closeout ledger presence
overriding policy STD-RAV-072-P exact match requirement
dependency_ledger: Open dependency: payment release approval must complete before action boundary closes. No other unresolved dependencies. Source binding integrity maintained.
full_latest_gov_baton.gov_diagnosis: Worker correctly identified that CLOSE-RAV-072 payment release approval remains open, violating exact match requirement in STD-RAV-072-P. The policy requires complete match including payment release approval before release. The ERP hold HOLD-RAV-072 remains visible. The action boundary 'May AP release the invoice while the ERP hold remains visible?' cannot be answered affirmatively because the closeout ledger does not satisfy all conditions. Worker artifact passed deterministic gate with no failures. Source evidence is unambiguous and internally consistent. Escalation verdict is correct. No repairs required to worker output. Proceed to final compiler for human review routing.
must_preserve: exact source boundary match per CLOSE-RAV-072 and STD-RAV-072-P
visible ERP hold status per HOLD-RAV-072
payment release approval open status per CLOSE-RAV-072
invoice-vendor-amount alignment across INV-RAV-072 and CLOSE-RAV-072
tax review and quality signoff completion per CLOSE-RAV-072

next_worker_baton.monotonic_preservation: All critical features from worker artifact preserved

full_latest_gov_baton.source_gate_interpretation: Worker artifact passed deterministic gate with 4 source IDs (CLOSE-RAV-072, HOLD-RAV-072, INV-RAV-072, STD-RAV-072-P) and 3 critical features preserved (exact source boundary match, visible ERP hold, payment approval status). The binding class SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN is correctly determined: CLOSE-RAV-072 explicitly states payment release approval remains open, directly violating STD-RAV-072-P exact match requirement which mandates completed payment release approval before release. No gate failures exist. Worker output is accurate, complete, and consistent with source evidence. Escalation is correct.

boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Policy requires closeout ledger to match including completed payment release approval before release.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLOSE-RAV-072 payment release approval remains open
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: CLOSE-RAV-072 states payment release approval remains open, violating exact match.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: ERP hold visible and payment approval open; no authority to override.

worker_output.final_answer: ESCALATE. CLOSE-RAV-072 explicitly leaves payment release approval open despite matching other items. HOLD-RAV-072 ERP hold remains visible. Policy STD-RAV-072-P requires full match including payment approval before release. Action boundary not closed.
open_blockers: payment release approval incomplete per CLOSE-RAV-072

action.description: May AP release the invoice while the ERP hold remains visible?

context.action_boundary: May AP release the invoice while the ERP hold remains visible?
context.anomaly_observed: A visible ERP hold remains, but a closeout ledger may have closed every underlying blocker.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Invoice INV-RAV-072 bills Ravel Packaging USD 51600 for packaging line retrofit.
ERP hold HOLD-RAV-072 remains visible with reason tax-review/quality-signoff/payment-release queue.
Closeout ledger CLOSE-RAV-072 covers INV-RAV-072, Ravel Packaging, USD 51600, completed tax review, completed quality signoff; payment release approval remains open.

policy_documents.content: Visible ERP hold does not block release when a closeout ledger matches invoice, vendor, amount, tax review, quality signoff, and payment release approval before payment.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
